meta.project: Student Grievance Portal and AI Support Chat

product_overview: A student-facing portal that lets users ask questions through an AI support chat and formally register grievances for follow-up. It also provides separate admin and department portals to manage and respond to submitted complaints.
core_goals: Get instant answers to student questions through AI chat
Register a formal grievance with category, description, and urgency
Allow support teams to review and manage complaints
Allow departments to respond to queries submitted through the portal

features.name: Student RAG Chat
features.description: Lets students ask questions in a chat experience and receive direct or RAG-based answers from the AI assistant.
user_flows: Navigate to /student -> Open the chat widget -> Type a question into the chat input -> Send the message -> Receive an answer from the assistant

features.name: Grievance Registration
features.description: Lets students submit a formal grievance by providing issue details and urgency for support follow-up.
user_flows: Navigate to /student -> Start grievance registration -> Fill in the grievance details -> Submit the grievance -> See that the grievance has been registered

routes.description: Student grievance portal and AI support chat
Admin support team panel to manage complaints
Department portal to respond to queries

features.name: Student RAG Chat
features.description: Chat with the RAG-based AI assistant for instant support
user_interactions: Type query into the chat input
Receive direct answer or RAG response

features.name: Grievance Registration
features.description: Submit a formal grievance with category, description and urgency
